MARS+SUN+VENUS ... Wife is proud and straight-forward
and will have heat-oriented
complexities.
VENUS+MERCURY +
JUPITER ... It indicates the wife is BUDDH I
Character of Husband with the help of Mars
Husband is an erudite
If Jupiter, Mercury are posited in 2nd or S'h or in 9'h to Mars
or Jupiter + Mercury + Mars are combined in the above signs
husband will be an erudite with an extra-ordinary intelligent. If
Jupiter+ Mercury combination is in 2nd house to Mars the native
will speak smartly.
Husband is a drunkard I lazy:
If Moon, Rahu or Saturn are posited in 2nd to Mars or if
Moon + Rahu + Saturn are combined in 2nd or in 5* the husband
will be a good drinker. If Mars + Saturn + Moon combination is
